source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder has a water volume separated in $V_A$ = 0.2 m^3 and $V_B$ = 0.3 m^3 by a stiff membrane. The initial state in A is 1000 kPa, x = 0.75 and in B it is 1600 kPa and 250\circ\text{C}. Now the membrane ruptures and the water comes to a uniform state at 200\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer.

The initial state in A is 1000 kPa, x = 0.75 and in B it is 1600 kPa and 250\circ\text{C}. Now the membrane ruptures and the water comes to a uniform state at 200\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer.
